Run multiple scenarios

Source: R/scenario.R
chlaa_run_scenarios.Rd

Run multiple scenarios

Usage

chlaa_run_scenarios(
  pars,
  scenarios,
  time,
  n_particles = 200,
  dt = 0.25,
  seed = 1
)

Arguments

pars

Baseline parameters.

scenarios

List of `chlaa_scenario` objects.

time

Simulation times.

n_particles

Particles per scenario.

dt

Time step.

seed

Base seed (scenario i uses seed + i).

Value

A data.frame of simulation outputs with a `scenario` column. The returned data frame has an attribute `scenario_parameters`, a named list of the parameter lists used per scenario.
